title: Iran’s Top Negotiator Says Talks Failed Because U.S. Failed to Win Trust
summary_full: Iranian officials said that while Iran had approached the negotiations in good faith, the U.S. team had not gained the Iranian delegation’s trust.
summary_public: Iranian officials said that while Iran had approached the negotiations in good faith, the U.S. team had not gained the Iranian delegation’s trust.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran’s Top Negotiator Says Talks Failed Because U.S. Failed to Win Trust
